Project: skylit.ai
Goal: AI-powered website generator.
Stack: React + TS + Tailwind (dark theme), Express + TS, MySQL.
Focus: Maintain strict TypeScript types, modular controllers, and prepare for AI integration layer (service functions under a future `services/ai` directory). Use environment variables via dotenv when adding secrets later.
